description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: macOS native universal build, Linux with win32 cross-compilation, and Linux with win64 cross-compilation. Each job checks out the repository, sets up a cache, installs dependencies, clones and checks out a specific version of the PawPaw repository, bootstraps and builds the project, and uploads the resulting artifacts to GitHub Releases.
